heading: Leasing of housing
label: 2874 Leasing of housing
notes: Amendments2002—, in section catchline struck out “to be constructed” after “Leasing of housing”.Pub. L. 107–314, § 2802(b)(2)Subsec. (a). , added subsec. Text read as follows: “The Secretary concerned may enter into contracts for the lease of military family housing units or military unaccompanied housing units to be constructed under this subchapter.”Pub. children.heading: .—Lease Authorized
children.label: a .—Lease Authorized
children.text: The Secretary concerned may enter into contracts for the lease of housing units that the Secretary determines are suitable for use as military family housing or military unaccompanied housing.

children.heading: .—Use of Leased Units
children.label: b .—Use of Leased Units
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall utilize housing units leased under this section as military family housing or military unaccompanied housing, as appropriate.

children.heading: .—Lease Terms
children.label: c .—Lease Terms
children.text: A contract under this section may be for any period that the Secretary concerned determines appropriate and may provide for the owner of the leased property to operate and maintain the property.
